assertions.title: Evals CRUD preserves schema-bearing datasource and testing-criteria contracts

steps.expected: Mapped mocked coverage for eval create/retrieve/update/list/delete plus datasource/testing-criteria assertions.
steps.observed: tests/evals_contract.rs:14-207 creates a custom datasource with JSON schema and graders, retrieves a logs datasource, updates a stored_completions eval, lists with cursor params, deletes the eval, and validates blank-id guards.

steps.action: Review captured request/body assertions in tests/evals_contract.rs
steps.expected: Datasource config, testing criteria, metadata, and pagination are checked on the wire.
steps.observed: tests/evals_contract.rs:178-207 asserts /v1/evals CRUD/list routes, checks create_body.data_source_config.type=custom, include_sample_schema=true, grader pass_threshold/sampling_params, update metadata/name, and local validation on blank ids.

steps.expected: The mocked eval CRUD contract passes.

assertions.title: Eval runs expose reportable summaries and honor the unusual cancel route

steps.expected: Mapped mocked coverage for run creation, reportable summary fields, cancel behavior, and validation guards.
steps.observed: tests/eval_runs_contract.rs:32-178 creates a responses-backed run, retrieves a completions-backed run, lists runs, deletes one run, cancels another run, and validates blank eval/run ids.

steps.action: Review captured request/path and parsed-field assertions in tests/eval_runs_contract.rs
steps.expected: Run summaries and the unusual cancel route are asserted.
steps.observed: tests/eval_runs_contract.rs:71-89 asserts report_url, result_counts.total=1, and per_model_usage[0].model_name; tests/eval_runs_contract.rs:154-178 asserts the cancel path is /v1/evals/eval_123/runs/run_resp (not /cancel), create body uses responses datasource with file_content sampling params, and blank ids fail validation.

steps.expected: The mocked eval run contract passes.

assertions.title: Eval output-item retrieval preserves grader results and sample provenance

steps.expected: Mapped mocked coverage for output-item list/retrieve behavior and item-level provenance.
steps.observed: tests/eval_output_items_contract.rs:11-110 lists output items with cursor/status filters and retrieves one output item with datasource linkage, sample input/output, usage details, grader results, and validation guards.

steps.expected: Grader results, provenance, and usage details are asserted.
steps.observed: tests/eval_output_items_contract.rs:37-83 asserts result names and extra reason, sample usage.prompt_tokens and reasoning_tokens detail, datasource_item_id/question, sample input/output, sample error code, and grader sample rubric; tests/eval_output_items_contract.rs:90-110 asserts list/retrieve routes and blank-id validation.

steps.expected: The mocked eval output-item contract passes.

assertions.title: Eval Runs Support Full Inspection Across Datasource Families

steps.expected: Mapped mocked coverage across representative eval run datasource families and lifecycle routes.
steps.observed: tests/eval_runs_contract.rs:32-124 exercises create/retrieve/list using Responses+file_content, Completions+stored_completions, and Jsonl datasource families, then tests delete/cancel on eval runs.

steps.action: Review typed parsing assertions in tests/eval_runs_contract.rs
steps.expected: Datasource families keep report URLs, result counts, per-model usage, and typed status fields without schema loss.
steps.observed: tests/eval_runs_contract.rs:63-89 and 93-124 assert queued/in_progress/canceled statuses, report_url, result_counts, per_model_usage, Responses/Completions/Jsonl variants, and next_after pagination behavior.

steps.expected: The multi-family eval run contract passes.

frictions.description: Cargo output only reported test-function names, so mapping those passes back to VAL-ADV-005/006/007/014 required manual inspection of the corresponding test source and request assertions.
frictions.resolution: Reviewed tests/evals_contract.rs, tests/eval_runs_contract.rs, and tests/eval_output_items_contract.rs alongside the validation contract before writing the report.

frictions.description: The cancel-route test explicitly proves the non-/cancel path but does not separately assert the captured HTTP method in the test body.
frictions.resolution: Recorded the exact proven scope as route-path coverage plus successful cancel parsing from the passing mocked contract.

summary: Tested 4 assigned assertions on the mocked cargo surface: 4 passed. Evidence logs were captured for eval CRUD, eval run, and eval output-item contract tests using the isolated mock_evals target directory.
